title: The LLM week, compressed into one readable brief
subtitle: A builder-focused digest of models, agents, evals, infra and product shifts.

items.title: Realtime voice becomes context-aware
items.takeaway: The useful unit is not audio alone; it is audio plus working documents, tools and permissions.

items.title: Workplace agents hit the reliability wall
items.takeaway: Completion rates rise, but safety and rollback still decide production adoption.

items.title: Evaluation quality becomes product infrastructure
items.takeaway: LLM-as-judge variance is a system design problem, not a leaderboard footnote.

items.title: Open weights need runtime leverage
items.takeaway: Local/open models become strategically useful when wrapped in tools, queues, memory and human review.
